reviews.review_title: If only I could actually take the class
reviews.review_description: I am on a one-week trial and paid for the month subscription which begins in a couple of days. Every day I try to open the app and it is only in demo mode. I have uninstalled and reinstalled the app, checked my purchase history at Meta, and it says I have enrolled. But there is no way to try out the classes except for the free demo ones and no way to just let the first month start if that is what has to happen to actually try a class. So disappointed. If anyone has any advice, let me know. But I'm going to have to cancel and give up. It looks like a really nice app, but it is useless at this point.

developer_response.body: Hello Hoamie, we are so sorry to hear that you are experiencing this issue but our team is here to help! Please email us at support@hoame.ca so that we can help further troubleshoot with you. We look forward to resolving this issue and having you join us for the full app experience! 💛 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: Love the sound meditation and the essential one two and three

I absolutely love the Hoame app! It has truly become my time and my space to meditate, ground myself, and reset. The sessions are calming, beautifully guided, and easy to fit into my day. Whether I need a few mindful minutes or a longer meditation, Hoame always helps me feel centered, refreshed, and more at peace. It’s like having a sanctuary right in my pocket.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review Hoamie! We're grateful to have you as part of our community and look forward to seeing you in app 🧘 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: Really love this, but it just keeps freezing and won't load. I've ended up the opposite of relaxed. Would definitely keep this if worked😢

developer_response.body: Hello Hoamie! We are sorry to hear that you are experiencing this issue and our team is here to help. We have tried to replicate this concern on our end without success and have responded to your support email to help further troubleshoot with you. We look forward to resolving this issue and having you join us for practice! 💛 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: Everything is fun and exciting on this app but for very busy person that can only be on the app every now and then due to a busy lifestyle I find it very expensive

After exploring countless meditation apps, I finally found my perfect match. This app stands in a league of its own, offering an experience that beautifully caters to both seasoned practitioners and those just beginning their meditation journey. The movement meditation feature is truly revolutionary – it completely transformed my approach to mindfulness practice.

While I'm typically hesitant about subscription-based services, this app proves to be an exceptional investment in personal wellbeing. The development team's dedication to creating thoughtful, innovative content makes every session meaningful. Their commitment to continuous improvement and expansion of features shows in every update.

The positive impact this app has had on my daily life makes me genuinely excited to support its growth. If you're looking for a meditation app that combines authenticity, innovation, and genuine care for user experience, you've found it. I'm proud to be part of this community – or as we call ourselves, a Hoamie!

developer_response.body: We are incredibly touched by this wonderful review and are so very grateful to have you be part of our community as one of our Hoamies! 💛 It means a lot to our small team to hear how impactful our movement practices have been for you and how your time in app has positively affected your days. It's a joy to have you on the cushion and we look forward to seeing you grow with us! 🧘 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: The app is good, customer service hmm
reviews.review_description: I was using the app paying the subscription monthly and I decided to change to the yearly one. Hoame offered me to change the membership to the yearly with a 30% discount which I accepted. Meta was booking my membership for the full price and Meta told me that they are not able to reimburse the amount and I needed to contact the customer service from Hoame, I sent the email but the customer service does not exist. I even received an email from Meta with the updated price but nevertheless the booked the full price. This makes no sense. The offer from Hoame was fake only to attract customers for the yearly membership. This is really bad!!
Absolutely Fantastic!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful review Hoamie! We're grateful to have you as part of our community and look forward to seeing you in app 🧘 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: On the demo part, the meditation tutor croaks her voice, It's called vocal fry and it's not the type of voice I want to listen to while I'm trying to relax

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We recognize that users have their own unique preferences and that not all voices may resonate with all users. As our demo only showcases two classes, we would encourage you to try our 7-day free trial to experience the many different meditation teachers on the Hoame app who have their own unique styles and ways of guiding. We have daily classes and a vast library of content and are confident that you will be able to find a teacher and practice that you enjoy! We hope you will give our full app a try and look forward to seeing you when you do. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: I love it

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review Hoamie! We're grateful to have you as part of our community and look forward to seeing you in app 🧘 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: I wish there were more updates especially when it comes to rise.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your feedback with us. We are hard at work on some exciting updates behind the scenes and are planning to bring more Rise content to the app soon. If you have any other suggestions you would like to share, please reach out to support@hoame.ca, as we'd love to hear from you. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: Living with chronic pain can be an isolating and exhausting experience, and while my doctors recommend meditation practices and gentle movement, it can be hard for me to do these on my own. Then I found this app. For the first time in my life i feel like im actually able to manage my pain symptoms without additional medications.The app's immersive virtual environments and literally hundreds of classes to choose from help to create a sense of calm and relaxation, allowing me to focus on my breath and find relief from the constant discomfort. This has become an essential part of my daily routine, offering a much-needed respite from the challenges of living with chronic pain and helping me move with greater ease and comfort.

developer_response.body: Hi Hoamie! Thank you for taking the time to share this wonderful review! We are so very happy to hear you are finding relief with your pain and are able to live with more ease and comfort. We look forward to seeing you on the cushion ✨ - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: Having tested Hoame for a month, I find the application and its content promising. The course of the meditation and relaxation sessions is what comes close to what can be found in reality (this is what I appreciated). I really liked the augmented reality mode which gives the impression of having your guide in your living room and which also allows you to create a beautiful atmosphere by personalizing your space. The weak points: the image quality of the videos is not up to par with our headsets, some videos are even cut off abruptly. The lack of augmented reality content (we quickly got around to it even though that's what could make the difference (having your guide in your living room is what I expected and I'm far from being the only one who wants this feeling of proximity is more natural than a simple video). Sometimes the background music is annoying, deactivating it would be welcome (we cannot do this systematically). Apart from that I found the vast majority of the guides excellent! When you have developed your content in augmented reality, I will subscribe again. (Sorry for my english, i am french ^^).

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback and kind words with us!✨ We just released our mixed reality update this October and like yourself are greatly looking forward to continue building it out. We are so grateful that you took the time to download and experience Hoame and look forward to welcoming you back with further updates. Hope to see you on the cushion again soon.🧘 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: All of a sudden it’s a paid subscription
reviews.review_description: I went on this app several days and no subscription anywhere. Nothing about a trial and it was never live classes. I would never pay for this at this price you’re asking as it’s pure greed for what you’re not getting. The ratings say it all. Don’t bother with a follow up, I’ve uninstalled the app .

developer_response.body: Hi there and thank you for downloading our app. We recently noticed a bug that was affectng our demo experience for some users. We apologize for any confusion this may have caused. Since our launch back in January 2022, Hoame has been a paid subscription app, as this business model is necessary for our small team to continue to develop. We have been hard at work on our Mixed Reality update, which was released last week, and we hope this brings further value to our app experience. We value your feedback and hope to see you in app sometime soon. ✨ - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
Hoame has a variety of meditation options, which I like. I specifically like 'Rise' because I want to do morning stretches or yoga but can't bring myself to do it. 'Rise' is a nice, gentle body movement with a mindset meditation that's great for starting the day. 

I give the app 4.5 stars. Some things they can improve on is adding more "beginner friendly" meditations. A lot of the meditations are quite long, about 10-15 mins. I am someone who likes to finish what I start but since I'm still new to meditating, I find myself getting antsy and wondering how close I am to completing. I wish there were some that were only 3 minutes long. I know this is short, but it would help beginners build up their patience while still feeling proud that we fully completed a class rather than leaving halfway through.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this review ✨! We're so happy to hear that you are enjoying Rise; mindful movement is also our favourite way to start the day! 

We completely understand (and know ourselves) the feeling of becoming antsy as you begin a meditation practice. Studies on meditation have shown that to receive the benefits of a daily practice a minimum of 10 minutes is recommended, but we encourage our Hoamies to go at their own pace, observe with curiosity any feelings of discomfort and urgency, and work their way up. If you are looking for shorter timed practices, our Breathwork trainers allow for 5 minutes of guided breathwork, which would be a great way to work up to longer durations of practice. Thanks so much again for this review and we look forward to seeing you on the cushion! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
Took out the subscription and was looking forward to it with the real guides…. but static video is just so unsettling even though you have live/video people - just doesn’t feel right.

There was not enough on demand classes, just one of each (that I could find) and being in a different time zone was not able to join any life classes.

So all in all, could be a great app, but needs more thought and work.  When you are paying a subscription and can only get a couple of classes and poor environments - really is not worth the money.

developer_response.body: Hi MillerMills. It sounds like you unfortunately did not get to experience our full app. Once you make it past our two demo experiences and sign-up for our 7 day trial you will have full access to over 300+ virtual studio classes, and 20+ On Demand experiences, 10+ Breathwork experiences and more! ✨ You can join our daily virtual studio classes at any time, and you are also able to catch up by viewing them in our 'Past Classes' section of the app (main menu -> Virtual Studio -> Past Classes). We are continuing to add more content to the app every single day (we just added our interactive Crystals Series today! 💎) to ensure it is valuable to all of our Hoamies and hope that you give us another try now that you are aware of all the classes and experiences available to you. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
How do you cancel the free trial?

Thank you.

Vicki

developer_response.body: Hi there. We are sorry to see you go and we hope you give us another try in the near future (we have some exciting updates coming soon!). The subscription cancellations for Hoame are all completed through the Meta companion app under Subscriptions, the same way you would manage any of your other app subscriptions. We hope this helps. Stay well, The Hoame Team.

reviews.review_title: This is all about the money
reviews.review_description: I was thinking this experience would actually be good. I was disappointed.

developer_response.body: Hi KenVen362, thanks for sharing your feedback. We are consistently updating and adding to our app to increase value to our Hoamies. We also have a three-tiered subscription pricing model to offer increased discounts for longer commitments, with our Yearly Membership at $81.99 USD being the best value! With our 7 day free trial you can explore over 300+ classes with expert instructors, our On Demand series, breathwork experiences, our unique Starseed cosmic sandbox and more! ✨ We hope you will consider us for the future and keep an eye out for big updates coming soon. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: After paying 9.99 I learned that it only buys you a demo in a plain room and wants another ten bucks a month to get to the meditation environments it advertised. I'll go back to Tripp and VR Guided Meditation!

developer_response.body: Hi Macmhafele, after you watch our free demo you should be prompted to choose your subscription level at which point once you are subscribed you will have full access to our entire app! There you will find our daily classes in our Virtual Studio in addition to our library of On Demand classes in scenic locations. The $9.99 USD payment you are referring to is our monthly subscription cost as our demo is free to experience (our best deal is our yearly option for an upfront fee of just $81.99 USD) . We hope to see you in app again sometime soon! 🧘👋 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
It's that buggy I had to sit down and relax after I deleted it....

Not a good start if you are going down a subscription model for what you offer on the one app, at this price point. Is it worth adding this to our ever growing subscription digital world, where we own nothing, but just keeps you attached that you feel you might be missing out on something. Compare this price to netflix, psn, amazon music and what they offer to keep you locked in.
As to the bugs the demo started and got as far as "welcome to" then crashed, very slow loading as in not very well optimised and definitely not ready for release more of a beta than a gold release.
And finally even deleting the app was problematic. It was like getting rid of my ex, that thought I was a subscription.

developer_response.body: Hi there and thanks for sharing this feedback. Regarding the pricing subscriptions allow us to balance building the best app possible, support our team, and give pricing options that work for varying budgets. We offer a monthly, 6 month, and our yearly option, which is priced at $81.99 USD (averaging to $6.83 per month)! Thank you for your call out regarding the performance, we are actively working to address these issues in our next update coming very soon. We hope that your next experience is a more relaxing one and look forward to seeing you on the cushion. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
Before I even write a real review or sign up for a free trial, I already have problems. I just tried the demo and the free meditation, got bored and wanted to get out via the menu (B or Y button) and there is no way to leave the meditation without quitting the whole app. Neither B or Y buttons work. The same thing happened when I clicked the studio. Took forever to load then just got a woman in a blurry background saying Welcome to the studio (or something like that) and then it froze and the only way to get out is by quitting the app through the Oculus menu. Also “gazing” to start is like retro Cardboard/Gear VR controlling. We have controllers now. This is the same reason I won’t get Tripp. Some of us like to meditate lying down in bed and this is really annoying.

Now onto the subscription model. What a ripoff! You can get Guided Meditation (beautiful!) or Nature Treks and use headphones for the zillions of great meditations already out there on YouTube, Apple Music, Amazon Prime or other streaming services you may already have. There are tons of YouTube nature 360 videos and 1803D videos you can watch with meditations on your headphones. AltspaceVR even has free daily live group guided meditations in pretty environments.

I haven’t signed up for the 7 day trial yet but based on the free demo, I can’t imagine this being any better than what I already mentioned. Want a sound bath, singing bowls, binaural beats, Hemi-Sync, guided meditation, hypnosis? It’s all out there on services you probably already have. I guess if you have expendable income, don’t like to search or Google and want your hand held, go for it, but you will probably have deeper and better experiences with Hemi-Sync (Monroe Institute) or Brain-Sync (Kelly Howell) that you can listen to on headphones while watching pretty stuff in VR ( or just close your eyes! )

developer_response.body:
Hi there and thanks for sharing your feedback. We just released a new update that solves the issue of the freezing! 

Our intention with using gaze to start is that it allows you at the onset of your meditation practice to place your controllers in your lap or at your side (if that works for you) and centre yourself towards the instructor. This also provides the opportunity to look around in the environment before gazing to begin the practice. 

We use 360 video as well to allow users the ability to virtually drop into an authentic virtual studio experience by being placed on a front row cushion within our physical studio space. 

Our subscriptions allow us to balance building the best app possible, support our team, and give pricing options that work for varying budgets! We offer a monthly, 6 month, and our yearly option, which is priced at $81.99 USD (averaging to $6.83 per month) and is comparable, and often less expensive, than mobile-only apps.

We hope you are able to experience the free 7-day trial with us sometime soon. Thanks again for your feedback. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: It’s marked free. But once you get it, then you get to see the subscription for $9.99. I hate it when people do this.  With Alcove I can meditate for free.

developer_response.body: Hi Janet, we do believe in offering a strong try-before-you-buy demo version of our app so that is what technically lists as free within the store page. It does note that subscriptions are available for purchase and our reason for this model is to be able to bring users daily ongoing studio classes and to be able to build a valuable app for our community. Thank you and we hope to see you on the cushion. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: Getting bad reviews because of price
reviews.review_description: It’s a good app, I think the concept of live classes is good and the graphics/images are high quality. Obviously some people see $10 a month as too much and it depends on your prospective but I would suggest offering pre-recorded content sessions for cheaper or one-time purchases alongside the subscription. Maybe a once a month shorter free session (to keep people engaging with the app) Also would be nice to have some type of full package.Buy a year at a higher price and get sent a meditation pillow from the studio for example. Maybe more personalization of the virtual space.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for sharing your feedback and for your kind words about our first iteration of the app! We are collecting feedback from the community in order to make the next version of the app even better so we're appreciative of all your comments. We hope you continue to keep practicing and growing with us! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: Only review you need to read…
reviews.review_description: Best tip: ignore the demo and download it! The demo gives you the smallest glimpse of everything this app has to offer. In all honesty it’s the most robust content heavy app I have downloaded on the quest. Hundreds (no joke!) of experiences and not just studio classes (like the demo) but specialty sessions like where you get to float weightlessly in space in a satellite, social connections where you can talk to others in app and honestly so much more. I committed to trying it for a week and hands down knew I was keeping my subscription 1 day in.

developer_response.body: Thrilled to hear that you are exploring and enjoying every corner of our app! It sounds like you are enjoying our shared worlds and experiences and we're looking forward to practicing with you there! Thanks for being a part of our growing community 🌎 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
The new shared Avatar worlds are really bringing a live, "in studio" feel to the app.  

I can see myself spending more and more time at Hoame if this keeps improving! 

Great additions for the app!

developer_response.body: We're so happy to hear that you are enjoying your experience in app. Thank you so much for taking the time to share this beautiful review! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: To be honest I bought this app on my therapists recommendation to help my mental health. I have been using it for about 3 months now. I have suffered from OCD, generalized anxiety disorder and depression since I was young and nothing has really helped me that much. When I read that the founders of this app are mental health clinicians I thought its worth trying. I was so surprised to see that its more of a fun, interactive and game like app instead of an intimidating clinical app like I was expecting. I have been slowly making my way through the content (warning there is so much here!). I love the soundbaths, the breathwork class and also the breathwork trainer. I also really enjoy the sleep classes. I still have up and down days but for the first time ever I feel like I actually have a strategy and tool that can help me. Thanks Hoame! Also I just joined your Facebook group too!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to share about your experience using our app and for being a part of the Hoame community! It fills our hearts to know how the practices and experiences have helped you.💛 We are constantly updating and adding new content that will hope will continue to help you on your journey. We look forward to seeing you on the cushion! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: Stunning! I LOVE HOAME and you will too
reviews.review_description:
Where do I start….the teachers are my favourite. It’s incredible to have your own personal guide an arms length away (especially if you are a complete beginner like myself and get lost with audio only apps). Suse always keeps me grounded with all the little mindfulness tools she offers and Liz is just pure light with the most soothing voice. I find my stress levels instantly drop as soon as I am transported into the beautiful meditation room with all the greenery and blue sky. 

Rise is a very unique take on a lot of the other fitness apps out there…who would have thought moving mindfulness could raise my heart rate in a way that feels calming and inspiring. 

And if you’re an anxious person like me you HAVE to try the breathwork trainers and classes. I am amazed at how breathing a certain way can make all my stress and tension melt away or leave me feeling energized. Just magic. 

The Sleep classes with Patricia (her voice is incredible) in the natural environments and Soundbaths with Luciana are *chefs kiss*. 

I could go on and on but I leave you with this. Don’t just walk, RUN to subscribe. Your mental health will THANK YOU 🧠

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this beautiful review! We love hearing what parts of the app our Hoamies are enjoying most. We are so very grateful to have you as part of our community and look forward to seeing you in app 🧘- The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: I am not really someone who gives reviews but I wanted to leave one for this app because I read one of the reviews on here and it convinced me to download and I am so glad I did so I hope I do the same for someone else. At first glance I wouldn’t really give it a 2nd look but someone mentioned how they were finally able to meditate and also that this game is really unique and fun. I have been told that I should meditate but i find it boring and wasn’t sure if this app was going to be another app that just makes me “sit on a beach while listening to a soft spoken voice” and this app isn’t like that at all. They have a class called “rise” that is very mind/body, there is a cool spaceship experience where you float around and like zen out in space , another one where you can throw stars around the galaxy while listening to this trippy music and also they have these interactive experiences like talking to other people in the app. I also like the breath trainer and the life force thing is cool to actually SEE you breath as you breathe in and out. There is so much more too. Honestly try it its super cool and an awesome innovative way to meditate.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for giving Hoame a chance and for sharing this wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you are enjoying so many aspects of our app and look forward to seeing you on the cushion.✨  - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
Instructors are great.  Layout and UI are fantastic. 
95% of sessions are 10mins. 
Just not long enough for me.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for sharing your feedback with us and for the kind words about our layout and UI! We see that you have experienced our Virtual Studio which features shorter meditations in the 10/15/20 minute range. If you are looking for longer meditations we suggest both our On Demand meditations which are 30 minutes long  and catching one of our upcoming community events which range from 30 minutes to 1 hour. We are all about community support and feedback and will be taking your comments into consideration as we continue to build and grow our app to be bigger and better for our Hoamies 🧘 🌎. Thanks again for sharing and we hope to see you on the cushion soon!

reviews.review_title: I like it but nav needs help
reviews.review_description: I really like these classes so far but it would be helpful to know how long each class is before getting into it.  Also, for the life of me I cannot, once finishing a class, exit out of the Home Screen without having to restart the Oculus.  No amount of menu or oculus button pressing does the trick, nor is there any obvious alternate method to exit the app.

developer_response.body: Hi MelfredTheGreat! Welcome to the community, we're so happy to hear that you are enjoying the classes with us so far.✨Class duration is located on the left information panel for all of our on-demand classes and can be found in the class title (ex. Breathe 10 or Sound 20) in our virtual studio. In order to fully exit out of the app please press the Oculus button on your controller which will prompt an exit option. When you are in class with us the Y or B buttons will also bring up the exit button if you look slightly downwards. We hope this helps and that we continue to see you for daily meditations with us 🙌🧘! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: I was disappointed. It was even bad if a free demo.  This is an entry level at best. The ambient audio was terrible as well.

developer_response.body: Hi forjam, unfortunately we were experiencing a server interruption yesterday but we are now back online! Now you will be able to experience the full Hoame app with our daily virtual classes and On Demand experiences. We also have an exciting update in the works in the very near future. We hope you'll give our app another chance and look forward to seeing you on the cushion. 🧘 - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description:
Was excited to try it- I love the natures scapes and one of the meditation studio sessions but I was a bit disappointed with:

-sound was distorted with the crystal bowls (not my oculus volume, I don’t have this issue with any other app

-not that many choices for mediations

-didn’t like the vibe of some of the instructors, it seemed too “put on”

- sound seemed delayed in starting, or it would start on one side then kick in on the other side 

- I don’t want to rate my mood every.single.time I start a session!  A choice to do so would be nice

The graphics were really nice!  Good job on that!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much Trish for taking the time to share this with us. We understand certain styles and teachers may resonate more than others and the beauty of having a diverse group of teachers, plus our new daily virtual studio classes, means that there is a practice for everyone! We are thinking that the crystal bowl sounds you are referencing may just be the powerful and unique vibration that the sound bowls create, which are experienced in person as well. We will definitely note this for sessions moving forward. Please be on the lookout for more sound classes for you to check out on our virtual studio schedule. Thanks as well for the rest of your helpful feedback and stay tuned for more exciting updates coming soon! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: Self care but make it cool
reviews.review_description: If you are Type A and need something to de-stress download this app. Honestly well worth the $$.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for giving our app a try and for the kind review Hoamie. Looking forward to practicing together!🧘- The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: I have had this app for a few months and try to use it a few times a week. I know the benefits of meditation but honestly I never prioritize it. When I have the time I usually do a workout from another app. And then one day I found  Rise! It’s a weird combo of movement and meditation but it actually works and is pretty unique! For someone like me I feel I get the best of both worlds and well worth the time investment. If you are a fitness buff but also trying to be mentally fit you need to try this!! Literally never tried anything like this before. Please please hoame team if you see this put in more Rise classes!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for being a part of our Hoame community and for leaving this beautiful review! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying our app and the Rise class in particular. We have more classes in store so please keep an eye out for updates in the near future. ✨ We look forward to seeing you on the cushion! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_title: I can’t even get this to work…
reviews.review_description: I have the quest 2 and it won’t even let me enter the game.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we're sorry to hear that you are experiencing issues with your Quest 2. Kindly email us at info@hoame.ca and we will be sure to help you out. Hope to see you on the cushion soon! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: I have to start off by thanking the Hoame devs for creating this app. I am new to meditation and was looking for an app that had actual guidance. The Hoame teachers make me feel like I am right there, face-to-face… like I am getting a private meditation class IRL.  Starseed is incredible if you want to get lost in the cosmos (the piano soundtrack is so peaceful) and I love Rise for mindful movement. It’s exactly the kind of movement I find myself gravitating towards lately when I’m stressed. I’ll definitely be sticking around and look forward to seeing what the future updates have in store!

developer_response.body: This review was such a joy to read! Thank you so much Hoamie. We're so glad to have you as part of our community and can't wait to share the updates we have in store. ✨ See you on the cushion! - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: Never given an app 5 stars before! (Ha ha! I’m very hard to please!) but this app gave me exactly what I wanted from a VR wellness app. I’m able to sink deep into my meditations. Relieve my stress and sleep so much better! Exactly what a stressed out accountant like me needs.

developer_response.body: We are so thankful to a be a recipient of your ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐! Thank you for allowing us to be a part of your journey. - The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: actually really glad to have stumbled upon hoame. A great mindful addition to my quest.

developer_response.body: We are so happy to hear this! Thanks for joining our community! We look forward to practicing together.🧘- The Hoame Team

reviews.review_description: This is such a creative and innovative meditation app. I had to install and check out the demo experience to actually see that there is so much more in store when you actually sign up. Classes look fantastic, teachers - personable and warm, and the way they have extended meditation and mindfulness into other parts of the app is really well done. Would definitely recommend this app for anyone looking to de-stress (I guess that means everyone…😂).

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this beautiful review! We are so happy to hear that you are enjoying the app and are grateful to have you as part of our Hoame community. See you on the cushion! - The Hoame Team 🧘

reviews.review_title: Liked what i seen so far 🤍
reviews.review_description: I really want to try it,  liked what i seen so far, but seems kinda expensive, will you guys have any specials any time soon? 😇🙂🤍

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words and review! We love to recommend to our new Hoamies our Yearly Subscription which works out to just $6.83 USD a month. With this subscription you will get access to daily meditation classes, Starseed and Life Force sandbox experiences, our Rise mind-body workout, breathwork trainers, all of our content updates, and more!  We also have a ✨big✨ update coming this October that will provide our Hoamies with even more calm and connection that we hope you can join us for. Thanks again for taking the time to share this review with us and we hope to see you on the cushion! - The Hoame Team
